name: Orange Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Place the pork in a shallow bowl.
3. Puree the soy sauce, ginger, garlic and half of the orange juice in a blender.
4. Pour half of the mixture over the pork.
5. Add the grated orange peel.
6. Cover.
7. Marinate at room temperature for 2 hours.
8. Combine the remaining soy sauce mixture with the remaining orange juice, the sherry, chicken broth, measured amount of honey, cornstarch and star anise.
9. Heat to boiling.
10. Boil until the sauce thickens (about 1 minute), stirring constantly.
11. Strain.
12. Lift the pork from the marinade.
13. Place on a roasting rack in a pan.
14. Brush with the unmeasured honey.
15. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
16. Insert a meat thermometer into the center of the meat.
17. Roast to an internal temperature of 150°F (65°C) for 30-40 minutes.
18. Remove from the oven and immediately cover with foil.
19. Let stand for 10 minutes (the meat will continue cooking).
20. Slice to serve.
21. Garnish with orange slices.
22. Strain the pan gravy into a saucepan and serve separately.
